scores.correctness_notes: Accurately covers CollectStatusEvent, add_status(), collect_unit_status vs collect_app_status (leader-only), priority ordering, component-based pattern, and the restriction on ErrorStatus/UnknownStatus — all matching the gold standard. Adds valid extra detail about sub-components as ops.Object, which is correct.
scores.hallucination_notes: Claims the exception raised is 'InvalidStatusError' — the gold standard confirms that passing ErrorStatus/UnknownStatus is an error but does not name the exception class; this specific name is unverified. Also asserts 'ops ≥ 2.5.0' as the version introducing CollectStatusEvent without citation, which is an unverified minor factual claim.
